label: Reveal or Punish
description: Each player reveals a card matching a condition or suffers a penalty

label: Stack & Escalate
description: Effects scale with the number of twists already played

label: Chained Reveals
description: Play top cards from the villain deck, adding new threats

label: Hero KO
description: KO heroes from HQ, hand, or discard pile

label: Wound Distribution
description: Each player gains wound cards into their deck

label: Hand Disruption
description: Each player discards cards from their hand

label: Board Manipulation
description: Move villains or heroes between city spaces or zones
